message.content:
@startuml
skinparam nodesep 100
skinparam ranksep 100
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam defaultFontName "Arial"
skinparam defaultFontSize 14
skinparam defaultFontColor black
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam sequenceArrowFontSize 12
skinparam sequenceArrowFontName "Arial"
skinparam sequenceArrowFontColor black
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor black
skinparam sequenceParticipantBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderColor black
skinparam sequenceParticipantFontName "Arial"
skinparam sequenceParticipantFontSize 14
skinparam sequenceParticipantFontColor black
skinparam sequenceParticipantPadding 10
skinparam sequenceParticipantMargin 10
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderThickness 1
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderRadius 5
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderDashed false
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderDotted false
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderSolid true
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderWidth 1
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderHeight 1
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderSpacing 0
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderPadding 0
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderMargin 0
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderOffset 0
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderShift 0
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderRotate 0
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderSkew 0
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderScale 1
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderOpacity 1
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderVisibility visible
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderDisplay inline
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderPosition inside
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderAlignment center
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderJustify center
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderWrap wrap
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderOverflow hidden
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderClip clip
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderMask mask
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderBlend blend
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderComposite composite
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderSource source
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderDestination destination
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderDirection direction
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderOrientation orientation
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderRotation rotation
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderSkewX skewX
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderSkewY skewY
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderScaleX scaleX
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderScaleY scaleY
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderTranslateX translateX
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderTranslateY translateY
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderRotateX rotateX
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderRotateY rotateY
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderRotateZ rotateZ
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderPerspective perspective
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderOrthographic orthographic
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderIsometric isometric
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderDimetric dimetric
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderTrimetric trimetric
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderOblique oblique
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderCabinet cabinet
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderMilitary military
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderCavalier cavalier
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderCabinet cabinet
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderMilitary military
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderCavalier cavalier
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderCabinet cabinet
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderMilitary military
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderCavalier cavalier

participant a as "a"
participant b as "b"
participant c as "c"

a -[#black,dashed]-> c
a -[#black,dashed]-> b
b -[#black,dashed]-> c

@enduml
